title: Kalshi’s legal troubles pile up, as Arizona files first ever criminal charges over ‘illegal gambling business’
summary: Arizona has filed the first criminal charges against prediction market Kalshi for allegedly operating an illegal gambling business, marking an escalation in regulatory efforts to control the industry. The action signals state determination to impose gambling regulations despite the platform's claims of exemption. This represents a significant new legal threat to the prediction market sector.
content: It's the latest salvo in an escalating battle between state regulators and an industry that claims it's not beholden to them.

zh.title: Kalshi的法律问题堆积，亚利桑那州首次对"非法赌博业务"提出刑事指控
zh.summary: 亚利桑那州对预测市场Kalshi首次提起刑事诉讼，指控其经营非法赌博业务，这标志着监管部门控制该行业的努力升级。该行动表明州政府决心实施赌博监管，尽管该平台声称获得豁免。这代表了对预测市场部门的重大新法律威胁。

fr.title: Les ennuis juridiques de Kalshi s'accumulent, l'Arizona dépose les premières accusations criminelles pour "activité de jeu illégale"
fr.summary: L'Arizona a déposé les premières accusations criminelles contre le marché de prédiction Kalshi pour avoir prétendument exploité une activité de jeu illégale, marquant une escalade des efforts réglementaires pour contrôler l'industrie. L'action signale la détermination de l'État à imposer des réglementations sur les jeux malgré les prétentions d'exemption de la plateforme. Cela représente une nouvelle menace juridique importante pour le secteur des marchés de prédiction.

de.title: Kalshis rechtliche Probleme häufen sich, Arizona erhebt erste Strafanzeige wegen "illegales Glücksspielgeschäft"
de.summary: Arizona hat die ersten Strafanzeigen gegen den Vorhersagemarkt Kalshi erhoben, da dieser angeblich ein illegales Glücksspielgeschäft betrieb, was eine Eskalation der behördlichen Bemühungen zur Kontrolle der Branche darstellt. Die Maßnahme signalisiert die Entschlossenheit des Staates, Glücksspielvorschriften durchzusetzen, trotz der Behauptungen der Plattform auf Befreiung. Dies stellt eine erhebliche neue rechtliche Bedrohung für den Vorhersagemarktsektor dar.

es.title: Los problemas legales de Kalshi se acumulan, Arizona presenta los primeros cargos penales por "negocio de juego ilegal"
es.summary: Arizona ha presentado los primeros cargos penales contra el mercado de predicción Kalshi por operar presuntamente un negocio de juego ilegal, marcando una escalada en los esfuerzos regulatorios para controlar la industria. La acción señala la determinación estatal de imponer regulaciones de juego a pesar de los reclamos de exención de la plataforma. Esto representa una nueva amenaza legal significativa para el sector del mercado de predicción.

title: Apple can delist apps "with or without cause," judge says in loss for Musi app
summary: A judge dismissed the Musi app's lawsuit against Apple, ruling the company can remove apps from its App Store with or without cause and sanctioning Musi's lawyers for fabricating facts. The decision reinforces Apple's broad authority over App Store moderation. The ruling effectively closes off a major legal challenge to Apple's app curation powers.
content: Judge tosses Musi case against Apple, sanctions lawyers for "mak[ing] up facts."

zh.title: 苹果可以"任意"下架应用程序，法官在Musi应用案中败诉
zh.summary: 一位法官驳回了Musi应用程序对苹果的诉讼，裁定该公司可以任意下架App Store中的应用程序，并对Musi的律师捏造事实进行了制裁。这一决定强化了苹果对App Store审核的广泛权力。该裁决有效地阻止了对苹果应用甄选权的重大法律挑战。

fr.title: Apple peut retirer des applications "à volonté ou sans cause", dit le juge dans la défaite de l'application Musi
fr.summary: Un juge a rejeté la plainte de l'application Musi contre Apple, statuant que l'entreprise peut supprimer les applications de son App Store à volonté et sanctionnant les avocats de Musi pour fabrication de faits. La décision renforce l'autorité générale d'Apple sur la modération de l'App Store. La décision ferme effectivement une contestation judiciaire majeure des pouvoirs de curation d'applications d'Apple.

de.title: Apple kann Apps "nach Belieben oder ohne Grund" delisten, sagt der Richter im Fall gegen die Musi-App
de.summary: Ein Richter wies die Klage der Musi-App gegen Apple ab und entschied, dass das Unternehmen Apps aus dem App Store nach Belieben entfernen kann, und sanktionierte die Anwälte von Musi wegen Herstellung von Fakten. Die Entscheidung stärkt die umfassende Autorität von Apple über die App-Store-Moderation. Das Urteil verschließt effektiv eine große rechtliche Herausforderung für die App-Kuratierungskräfte von Apple.

es.title: Apple puede deslistar aplicaciones "a voluntad o sin causa", dice juez en derrota de la aplicación Musi
es.summary: Un juez desestimó la demanda de la aplicación Musi contra Apple, sentenciando que la empresa puede eliminar aplicaciones de su App Store a voluntad y sancionando a los abogados de Musi por fabricar hechos. La decisión refuerza la amplia autoridad de Apple sobre la moderación de App Store. La sentencia efectivamente cierra un desafío legal importante para los poderes de selección de aplicaciones de Apple.

title: How World ID wants to put a unique human identity on every AI agent
summary: Worldcoin's World ID is exploring iris-scan backed unique identity tokens for AI agents to prevent coordinated attacks and swarms from overwhelming online systems. The approach would verify that digital actors are distinct entities. This infrastructure could become critical as AI agent proliferation accelerates.
content: Iris-scan backed tokens could help stop agent swarms from overwhelming online systems.

zh.title: World ID如何想为每个AI代理赋予独特的人类身份
zh.summary: Worldcoin的World ID正在探索由虹膜扫描支持的AI代理的独特身份令牌，以防止协调的攻击和大量AI代理淹没在线系统。该方法将验证数字演员是不同的实体。随着AI代理数量的增加，这一基础设施可能变得至关重要。

fr.title: Comment World ID veut mettre une identité humaine unique sur chaque agent IA
fr.summary: Le World ID de Worldcoin explore les jetons d'identité uniques soutenus par scan d'iris pour les agents IA afin de prévenir les attaques coordonnées et les essaims qui submergent les systèmes en ligne. L'approche vérifierait que les acteurs numériques sont des entités distinctes. Cette infrastructure pourrait devenir critique à mesure que la prolifération d'agents IA s'accélère.

de.title: Wie World ID jedem KI-Agenten eine einzigartige menschliche Identität geben möchte
de.summary: Worldcoins World ID erforscht iris-scan-gestützte eindeutige Identitäts-Token für KI-Agenten, um koordinierte Angriffe und Schwärme zu verhindern, die Online-Systeme überlasten. Der Ansatz würde überprüfen, dass digitale Akteure unterschiedliche Entitäten sind. Diese Infrastruktur könnte kritisch werden, da sich die Verbreitung von KI-Agenten beschleunigt.

es.title: Cómo World ID quiere poner una identidad humana única en cada agente de IA
es.summary: El World ID de Worldcoin está explorando tokens de identidad únicos respaldados por escaneo de iris para agentes de IA para prevenir ataques coordinados y enjambres que abrumen los sistemas en línea. El enfoque verificaría que los actores digitales sean entidades distintas. Esta infraestructura podría volverse crítica a medida que la proliferación de agentes de IA se acelera.

title: Mistral bets on ‘build-your-own AI’ as it takes on OpenAI, Anthropic in the enterprise
summary: Mistral is launching Mistral Forge, allowing enterprises to build custom AI models from scratch on their own data, directly challenging OpenAI and Anthropic's fine-tuning approaches. The platform emphasizes full data ownership and model customization from the ground up. The move positions Mistral as an alternative for organizations prioritizing model control.
content: Mistral Forge lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on their own data, challenging rivals that rely on fine-tuning and retrieval-based approaches.

zh.title: Mistral 押注"自建AI"，在企业市场与OpenAI和Anthropic正面竞争
zh.summary: Mistral正在推出Mistral Forge，允许企业在自有数据上从零开始构建自定义AI模型，直接挑战OpenAI和Anthropic的微调方法。该平台强调完全的数据所有权和从头开始的模型定制。这一举措将Mistral定位为优先考虑模型控制的组织的替代方案。

fr.title: Mistral parie sur l'IA « fabriquée par vous-même » en affrontant OpenAI et Anthropic sur le marché des entreprises
fr.summary: Mistral lance Mistral Forge, permettant aux entreprises de construire des modèles d'IA personnalisés à partir de zéro sur leurs propres données, remettant directement en question les approches de fine-tuning d'OpenAI et Anthropic. La plateforme met l'accent sur la propriété totale des données et la personnalisation des modèles à partir de zéro. Cette démarche positionne Mistral comme une alternative pour les organisations qui privilégient le contrôle du modèle.

de.title: Mistral setzt auf „Do-it-yourself-KI", während es gegen OpenAI und Anthropic im Unternehmensbereich antritt
de.summary: Mistral führt Mistral Forge ein, das Unternehmen ermöglicht, benutzerdefinierte KI-Modelle von Grund auf mit ihren eigenen Daten zu erstellen und damit OpenAIs und Anthropics Feinabstimmungsansätze direkt in Frage zu stellen. Die Plattform betont vollständige Dateneigentümerschaft und Modellanpassung von Grund auf. Der Schritt positioniert Mistral als Alternative für Organisationen, die Modellkontrolle priorisieren.

es.summary: Mistral está lanzando Mistral Forge, permitiendo a las empresas construir modelos de IA personalizados desde cero en sus propios datos, desafiando directamente los enfoques de ajuste fino de OpenAI y Anthropic. La plataforma enfatiza la propiedad total de los datos y la personalización de modelos desde cero. Este movimiento posiciona a Mistral como una alternativa para las organizaciones que priorizan el control del modelo.

title: I went to the Pentagon to watch Pete Hegseth scold war reporters
summary: A reporter describes covering Pentagon briefings during an ongoing conflict with Iran, detailing new journalist restrictions implemented under Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. The narrative captures challenges of war reporting amid heightened security protocols and limited access to facilities. The situation illustrates tensions between press freedom and military operations.
content:
It is day 13 of America's surprise war with Iran - by sheer coincidence, it's Friday the 13th - and I am delirious. I haven't had a coffee since I woke up at 5AM, because I'm not allowed to bring outside beverages into the Pentagon (the security screening cutoff was at 7AM for the 8AM), and ever since Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth changed the rules last year, journalists are not allowed to go anywhere in the building without an escort, especially to wherever coffee is available. Also, I am struggling to comprehend why I, a reporter who has never covered a war, was assigned to sit in one of the good seats in the briefing room, watching Hegse …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我去五角大楼观看Pete Hegseth训斥战争记者

title: The Beats Studio Pro are nearly $200 off ahead of Amazon’s big spring sale
summary: Beats Studio Pro headphones are on sale for around $170, marking an all-time low price during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. While the design hasn't changed since 2017, they remain a solid cross-platform option with features like spatial audio for Apple users and seamless switching for Android. The discount makes the aging headphones competitive despite newer alternatives.
content:
Earlier this week, Apple unveiled the AirPods Max 2. The forthcoming over-ear headphones build on their predecessor with an H2 chip that powers a range of new features; however, they still don’t offer the sort of cross-OS compatibility you’ll get with a modern pair of Beats headphones — including the Beats Studio Pro, which are on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for an all-time low of around $169.95 ($180 off) in the run-up to Amazon’s annual Big Spring Sale.
Beats Studio Pro

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $169.95 at Amazon
 $349.99 $169.99 at Best Buy
 $349.99 $169.95 at Walmart

Although they’re undoubtedly getting a little long in the tooth — the Beats design hasn’t fundamentally changed since 2017 — the Beats Studio Pro remain a solid pair of platform-agnostic headphones, particularly at this price. They offer one-touch pairing with both iOS and Android devices, along with support for Apple’s Find My and Google’s Find Hub networks, allowing you to locate them a little easier should you ever misplace them. Apple users get hands-free Siri access and support for head-tracking spatial audio, while Android folks get an AirPods-like audio switching trick that lets you effortlessly jump between different Android devices (phones, Chromebooks, etc.).
As far as sound quality is concerned, the Studio Pro aren’t going to rival that of newer options like Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra or Sony’s WH-1000XM6 (or even the last-gen XM5, for that matter). Their custom 40mm drivers don’t deliver anything exceptional, but their signature is balanced and decent enough, even if it sheds some of the low-end oomph for which Beats was once known. Plus, they offer an excellent transparency mode for piping outside noise and support lossless playback over USB-C, letting you leverage 24-bit / 48kHz  audio from compatible platforms like Spotify, Apple Music, and Amazon Music. Now, if only USB-C playback didn’t disable all access to their noise cancellation and transparency modes when active

title: Remedy’s live-service shooter Firebreak is getting its final major update
summary: Remedy Entertainment is releasing the final major update for its live-service shooter FBC: Firebreak, though the studio plans to maintain the game indefinitely. The "Open House" update adds new Control universe areas and gameplay improvements, but no new content is planned beyond this release. The decision reflects broader struggles in the live-service gaming market.
content:
FBC: Firebreak. | Image: Remedy Entertainment	

Remedy is winding down its team shooter FBC: Firebreak with a big update that launches today. But while the game won't be getting any new content going forward, the studio intends to keep it alive for the foreseeable future. It's yet another example of a live-service game struggling amidst a volatile market.
The new update is called "Open House," and it includes a handful of new areas pulled from Control (Firebreak is a spinoff that takes place in the Control universe), along with what Remedy describes as "gameplay improvements and balance changes aimed at making combat clearer, smoother, and more flexible." title: Spotify adds ‘Exclusive Mode’ audiophile feature for Windows PCs

content:
Starting Tuesday, Spotify users will have access to "Exclusive Mode," a new feature in the streaming service's Windows app that can help maximize audio quality by giving the Spotify app full control over your device's audio processing. According to Spotify, "your computer may alter audio before it reaches your DAC by resampling it, mixing other system sounds in, and changing the volume." Turning on Exclusive Mode prevents this, which Spotify says allows for "Bit Perfect playback." 
Exclusive Mode is currently only available to Spotify Premium users on Windows, but Spotify says it will also be coming to the Mac app "in a future release." To  …

title: Ikea tried to build a smart home for everyone — here’s why it’s not working yet
summary: Ikea's new Matter-over-Thread smart home products—including bulbs, sensors, and remotes starting at $6—promised to make smart homes affordable and accessible, but users report widespread connectivity and onboarding issues. content:
Ikea’s new smart bulbs, sensors, and remotes use Matter-over-Thread to connect to any compatible ecosystem — including Apple Home and Amazon Alexa. In theory. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Ikea's new Matter-over-Thread products were supposed to prove that the smart home could be cheap, accessible, and reliable. The highly anticipated line - which includes sensors, remotes, smart plugs, air-quality monitors, and smart bulbs - has most everything you need to build a smart home, with prices starting at $6. It's an exciting idea, but it's still not ready for primetime.
When I first got the Ikea devices in January, I had a lot of problems connecting them to my main platform, Apple Home. And it turned out I was not alone. Reddit forums and user reviews were full of reports of onboarding and connectivity issues. Many people were str …

title: Antigravity’s 360-degree drone is 20 percent off ahead of its next feature drop
summary: Insta360's Antigravity A1 drone is offering 20 percent discounts through April 16th, with Standard bundles starting at $1,279. The company will release a software update on April 15th adding voice controls, timelapse capture, and Virtual Cockpit features.
content:
Insta360’s Antigravity A1 is one of the most interesting drones on the market thanks to its included Vision Goggles, which provide a 360-degree first-person view through the drone’s cameras (a screen on the outside of its lenses shows what the pilot is seeing). Its cameras can shoot 8K video at 30 frames per second, or in 5.7K at 60 frames per second. And now, the company has launched its biggest discounts yet on all bundles, knocking 20 percent off the list price at Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Antigravity through April 16th.
Antigravity A1 drone

Where to Buy:

 $1599 $1279 at Amazon (Standard)
 $1599 $1279 at Best Buy (Standard)
 $1899 $1519 at Amazon (Explorer)

The ongoing promo ends just as the company is set to release a new set of features via a free software update. Before I dig into said features, however, here’s what each bundle includes and how much they currently cost. The most affordable bundle, which Antigravity calls the “Standard” set, costs $1,279 (originally $1,599). It includes the A1 drone, Vision Goggles, a remote control, a battery, a carrying case, and four spare propellers.
The “Explorer” and “Infinity” bundles are selling for $1,519 (was $1,899) and $1,599 (was $1,999), respectively. They include additional spare propellers and batteries, as well as other accessories not included in the entry tier, such as a sling bag and a charging hub. The priciest package comes with a quick reader for transferring drone footage to other devices, and high-capacity batteries instead of standard batteries included in other tiers.
In February, Antigravity shipped a new Flight Simulator mode, which lets you practice flying through the Vision Goggles without actually having to fly the drone. On April 15th, the company will launch voice controls to let you trigger certain shooting functions with a command, timelapse capture in multiple flight modes, and Virtual Cockpit. The latter inclusion can insert virtual assets into your view for fun, making it look

content:

summary: Samsung is discontinuing the Galaxy Z TriFold less than three months after launching the $2,899 device in the US, citing poor sales. The three-panel foldable will be wound down first in Korea, then discontinued in the US once inventory is cleared.
content:
It’s your last chance to grab the Galaxy Z TriFold before Samsung’s inventory runs out for good. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Samsung is preparing to axe its first three-panel foldable phone less than three months after launching the device in the US. Sales of the $2,899 Galaxy Z TriFold will first be wound down in Korea and then discontinued in the US once remaining inventory has been cleared, an unnamed Samsung spokesperson told Bloomberg.
This follows a report from Korean media outlet Dong-A Ilbo on Monday that says the TriFold will be getting a final domestic restock today, March 17th. Samsung's website stopped providing future restock updates for the foldable earlier this month, with the TriFold currently listed as "sold out" in the US. 
It was only availabl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Leaving civilization is now easier with this ‘off-grid utility core’
summary: Klumpen is a self-contained seven-square-meter module providing solar power, satellite broadband, shower, toilet, and kitchen facilities for off-grid living. Priced at approximately $35,000 plus shipping, the device eliminates the need for traditional utilities and permits.
content:
A prototype Klumpen being tested. | Image: Himmelsfahrtskommando	

Klumpen isn't an off-grid cabin, but it does provide all the utilities needed to live away from civilization comfortably. The seven-square-meter teepee is an "off-grid utility core" that provides solar-generated electricity, satellite broadband, a shower, toilet, and small kitchen. It's expected to cost around $35,000 plus an estimated $3,000 to ship within the EU.
The idea is to drop a factory-built Klumpen next to a small cabin and just press "on" - no need for any extra permits, plumbers, or electricians. The electrical system is built around a 7.5kWh battery with inverter to power standard 230V appliances and wall jacks. Water is recycl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Hands on with Aqara’s new Matter-compatible camera
summary: Aqara's Camera Hub G350 is the first commercially available Matter-compatible smart camera, featuring 4K pan-and-tilt video. Currently supporting only Samsung SmartThings, it marks the beginning of broader Matter ecosystem adoption for smart home security cameras.
content:
The Aqara G350 is the first camera you can buy that has support for Matter.	

The first Matter camera is here - sort of. Camera support came to the smart home standard last year, and Aqara's Camera Hub G350 is the first to support it. The G350, which was announced at CES, launched this week and is a pan-and-tilt indoor security camera with up to 4K video resolution. 
Today, the G350 only supports Matter on Samsung SmartThings, as none of the other platforms have added Matter 1.5 yet. I've only had the camera setup for a day, and it took several firmware updates before I could connect it as a Matter camera. So far, all it can do is stream a live feed, which is far less than what Samsung promises Matter cameras in Smar …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: SEC eyes shift to twice-yearly earnings reports
summary: The SEC is proposing to allow public companies to file earnings reports twice yearly instead of quarterly, according to the WSJ. This change could reduce reporting burdens for companies but may impact investor access to financial information. The proposal represents a significant shift in regulatory disclosure requirements.
content: The SEC is working on a proposal to allow public companies to release earnings reports twice a year instead of quarterly, per the WSJ.

zh.title: 美国证券交易委员会考虑转向半年度财报
zh.summary: 根据华尔街日报报道，美国证券交易委员会提议允许上市公司每年提交两次财报，而不是每季度提交一次。这一变化可能会减少公司的报告负担，但可能会影响投资者获取财务信息的机会。该提议代表了监管披露要求的重大转变。

Ce changement pourrait réduire le fardeau administratif des entreprises, mais pourrait affecter l'accès des investisseurs aux informations financières. La proposition représente un changement significatif dans les exigences réglementaires de divulgation.

Dies könnte die Berichtsbelastung für Unternehmen verringern, könnte aber den Zugang der Anleger zu Finanzinformationen beeinträchtigen. Der Vorschlag stellt eine bedeutende Verschiebung der aufsichtsrechtlichen Offenlegungsanforderungen dar.

es.title: La SEC contempla pasar a reportes de ganancias semestrales

Este cambio podría reducir las cargas de informes para las empresas, pero podría afectar el acceso de los inversores a la información financiera. La propuesta representa un cambio significativo en los requisitos reglamentarios de divulgación.

title: The Live Nation trial restarts with a ‘velvet hammer’
summary: After the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust case resumed with dozens of states taking the lead instead of the DOJ. States sought a mistrial over concerns about taking over the case, but Judge Arun Subramanian appeared likely to deny the request. The trial continues with new leadership in what constitutes a significant shift in the litigation.
content:
After a chaotic week following the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust trial picked back up surprisingly smoothly on Monday - this time, with dozens of states leading the case. 
This isn't the outcome the states originally wanted. Out of concerns about being able to effectively take over the case and fear that the jury would be prejudiced by the shakeup, they requested a mistrial, which would have restarted the court battle at an unknown future date. But an irritated Judge Arun Subramanian seemed likely to deny the request, and once the states figured out how to retain the DOJ's expert witn …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Live Nation诉讼重启，采取"柔和策略"
zh.summary: 在司法部与Live Nation-Ticketmaster的中期庭外和解后，反垄断诉讼恢复，数十个州而非司法部领导此案。各州因接管该案而寻求宣布审判无效，但Arun Subramanian法官似乎倾向于驳回该请求。该诉讼在新的领导下继续进行，这构成了诉讼中的重大转变。

fr.title: Le procès Live Nation reprend avec un 'coup de velours'
fr.summary: Après le règlement extrajudiciaire en cours de procès entre le Département de la Justice et Live Nation-Ticketmaster, le procès antitrust a repris avec des dizaines d'États prenant la tête à la place du DOJ. Les États ont demandé un procès nul en raison de préoccupations concernant la reprise de l'affaire, mais le juge Arun Subramanian semblait susceptible de rejeter la demande. Le procès continue avec une nouvelle direction, ce qui constitue un changement significatif dans le litige.

de.title: Das Live Nation-Verfahren wird mit 'Samthandschuhen' wieder aufgenommen
de.summary: Nach dem außergerichtlichen Vergleich des Justizministeriums mit Live Nation-Ticketmaster während des Prozesses wurde der Kartellfall mit Dutzenden von Staaten anstelle des DOJ in der Führung wieder aufgenommen. Die Staaten forderten ein Fehlurteil wegen Bedenken bezüglich der Übernahme des Falls an, aber Richter Arun Subramanian schien den Antrag ablehnen zu wollen. Der Prozess wird mit neuer Führung fortgesetzt, was einen bedeutenden Wechsel im Rechtsstreit darstellt.

es.title: El juicio de Live Nation se reinicia con 'mano de hierro en guante de terciopelo'
es.summary: Después del acuerdo extrajudicial del Departamento de Justicia con Live Nation-Ticketmaster durante el juicio, el caso antimonopolio se reanudó con docenas de estados tomando la delantera en lugar del DOJ. Los estados buscaban nulidad del juicio por preocupaciones sobre asumir el caso, pero el Juez Arun Subramanian parecía que sería probable rechazar la solicitud. El juicio continúa con nuevo liderazgo, lo que constituye un cambio significativo en el litigio.
